Serialized Form

  • Package cashier

    • Class cashier.cashier

      class cashier extends JFrame implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • accessLevel
          int accessLevel
          Access level of the currently logged-in employee.
        • cartList
          JList<cashier.CartLine> cartList
          Visual list component used to display the current order.
        • cartModel
          DefaultListModel<cashier.CartLine> cartModel
          Stores the current cart lines shown in the order list.
        • employeeId
          int employeeId
          ID of the currently logged-in employee.
        • employeeName
          String employeeName
          Full name of the currently logged-in employee.
        • menu
          Map<String,List<cashier.cashier.MenuItem>> menu
          Stores menu items grouped by category for display in the tabbed menu view.
        • toppings
          List<cashier.Topping> toppings
          List of available toppings loaded from the database.
        • totalLabel
          JLabel totalLabel
          Label that displays the subtotal, tax, and total for the current order.
